hero.quotePrimary: For God is not a God of disorder but of peace.
hero.title: Modernize your administration
hero.description: Simplify ministry so you can focus on what truly matters: people. A complete platform designed for the modern church.
hero.quoteSecondary: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.

features.title: Tools designed for service
features.membersDescription: A 360-degree view of your congregation. Track spiritual journeys, group participation, and baptisms with pastoral care.
features.calendarDescription: Sync events across departments in one sacred place.
features.donationsDescription: Transparent financial management and secure recurring giving via the app.
features.communicationDescription: Connect small groups and leaders instantly.

join.title: Join the future of ministry today
join.description: Experience the digital sanctuary that helps your church thrive in the modern era.

footer.description: Empowering modern churches with technology built for community and growth.

login.scriptureText: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
login.welcomeSubtitle: Enter your details to access the Claris portal.

register.scriptureDescription: Join a global community devoted to quiet reflection, digital ministry, and spiritual growth.
register.title: Create an account.
register.subtitle: Enter the Digital Sanctuary. Your path begins here.

code.label: Moment of Reflection
code.quote: Peace is the silence of the soul in harmony with the eternal.
code.title: Confirm your identity
code.subtitle: To keep your Claris secure, we sent a verification code to:
code.footerQuote: Whatever you do, do it with all your heart.

selectOrg.title: Select church
selectOrg.subtitle: Choose the organization you want to access.

adminRegister.scriptureQuote: Let all things be done with decency and order
adminRegister.title: Begin your management journey.
adminRegister.subtitle: Create an admin account to manage your church's digital presence.

sections.acceptText: By using the Claris platform, you agree to these terms and our Privacy Policy.
useItems: You are responsible for the information you provide.
Illegal, abusive, or unauthorized use is not allowed.
You must keep credentials secure and confidential.
sections.contentText: All Claris content and marks belong to their respective owners. You keep rights to your submitted content.
sections.suspensionText: We may suspend or terminate accounts for violations of these terms or to protect platform security.
sections.liabilityText: Claris is not liable for indirect losses arising from use or unavailability of the service, within legal limits.
sections.contactText: For questions about these terms, contact support.

sections.overviewText: Claris respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect information when you use the platform.
dataItems: Account data: name, email, phone, and organization.
usageItems: Communicate updates, support, and relevant information.
Ensure security, fraud prevention, and compliance.
sections.sharingText: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with essential vendors under confidentiality and security agreements.
sections.retentionText: We keep your data as long as needed to fulfill purposes described here and legal obligations. We apply technical and organizational measures to protect your information.
rightsItems: Access, correct, or delete your personal data.
sections.contactText: If you have questions, contact us through support.

support.title: Support contact
support.subtitle: We are here to help. We will respond as soon as possible.
support.helpfulText: To speed up support, share as much detail as possible, such as organization, problem description, and screenshots.
support.statusText: Check updates and scheduled maintenance on our status panel before opening a request.
